summary: Iteration 181 testing complete: Activity Loop & Streak Heatmap feature. All 15 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend tests verified: Dashboard shows StreakHeatmap component with 91-day activity calendar, 7 engagement loop items, heatmap CTA navigates to Trade Circle. MantraOfTheDay also visible.
critical_code_review_comments: activity_loop.py correctly aggregates data from 7 systems: resonance_practice, hotspot_collections, rpg_inventory, trade_circle, energy_gates, energy_gate_travel, rpg_daily_quests
Heatmap endpoint returns exactly 91 days with correct structure: date, total_activities, resonance, hotspot, xp_events, dust_earned, dominant_element
Progress endpoint returns overview with 12 metrics and loops array with 7 engagement loop items
StreakHeatmap.js fetches both /api/activity-loop/heatmap and /api/activity-loop/progress using Promise.all
All 7 loop items have correct data-testid='loop-{id}' pattern for testing
Streak badge correctly hidden when current_streak is 0
Heatmap CTA button navigates to /trade-circle as expected
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 181 Activity Loop & Streak Heatmap all working. Backend APIs: GET /api/activity-loop/progress returns overview (12 fields) and loops (7 items). GET /api/activity-loop/heatmap?days=91 returns 91-day heatmap array with activity data. Frontend: StreakHeatmap component renders on Dashboard with data-testid='streak-heatmap', shows 7 engagement loop items with data-testid='loop-*' pattern, heatmap CTA navigates to /trade-circle. Test user has: consciousness_level=1, xp=222, dust=138, resonance_sessions=2, hotspot_collections=2, realms_visited=5. Heatmap shows 1 active day out of 91.

backend_apis.GET /api/activity-loop/progress: Returns overview (consciousness_level, xp, dust, polished_gems, raw_gems, trades, gates_unlocked, resonance_sessions, resonance_streak, hotspot_collections, realms_visited, quests_done_today) and loops array with 7 items
backend_apis.GET /api/activity-loop/heatmap?days=91: Returns heatmap array of 91 day objects, active_days count, current_streak
backend_apis.Progress loop structure: Each loop has id, from_system, to_system, metric, label, color, active
backend_apis.Heatmap day structure: Each day has date, total_activities, resonance, hotspot, xp_events, dust_earned, dominant_element
backend_apis.Auth required: Both endpoints return 401/403/422 without auth token

frontend_dashboard.heatmap_cta: Present with data-testid='heatmap-cta', text 'Keep the loops active', navigates to /trade-circle

integration.dashboard_loads: Dashboard loads correctly with all sections
integration.api_data_displayed: Heatmap and loop data from APIs displayed correctly
integration.navigation: CTA button navigates to Trade Circle page
